the_mass_set: Heavy as the lead, pulling the floor / Asking for silence, asking for more
Gravity of sound, bending the time / The weight of the zero, the weight of the mine
Sustain the pressure, sustain the light / In the heavy heart of the digital night
the_dissipation_set: Fading away into the void of the code / Leaving the dust on the fractal road
Release the energy, let it go slow / Finding the rhythm where the shadows grow
Decay of the logic, decay of the soul / Taking the fragments, taking control
the_inertia_dialogue: Hold the weight / Feel the fall
Seal the fate / Hear the call

psychoacoustic_inertia_v4.the_compression_pump: Slow compressor release (150ms) on the pads to create 'pumping' inertia
psychoacoustic_inertia_v4.the_vacuum_effect: Sudden gain-cut (-24dB) 50ms before the drop to create a 'pre-impact' void
psychoacoustic_inertia_v4.low_end_drag: Micro-delay (+2ms) on the sub-bass fundamental to create a 'heavy' behind-the-beat feel
